arts.ttl: Arsenal step up pursuit of LaLiga goalkeeper as Gunners look to beat Barcelona to signing of £13million star
arts.sum: SIMON JONES: Atletico , Leverkusen and Barcelona have all expressed interest in the 23-year old but he has is willing to accept the challenge of competing for the number one slot.

arts.ttl: Bad news for Barca as La Liga issue fresh statement on FFP & Olmo
arts.sum: Among this documentation, a certificate issued by the club’s new auditor, appointed on December 31, 2024, was provided, recognizing that the transaction was correctly recorded as income in the club’s Profit and Loss account for the current season, as certified by the Club to LALIGA. 6. According to the aforementioned Interim Financial Statements, and in application of the NEP, FC Barcelona, with the subscription of said corporate operation, did not have on December 31, 2024, nor on January 3, 2025, nor has it had since that date, nor does it have today a balance or registration capacity, what is publicly known as ‘Fair Play’, for the registration of the players Dani Olmo and Pau Victor.

arts.ttl: Atletico Madrid vs Barcelona – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Atletico Madrid host Barcelona in the second leg of their Copa del Rey semi-final tonight. Two late goals from Diego Simeone’s side rescued a 4-4 draw in a thrilling first leg. Atleti were 2-0 ahead inside six minutes, before recovering from 4-2 down to level the tie. arts.ttl: Barça wrong to register Olmo, Víctor - LaLiga
arts.sum: LaLiga say Barcelona have never had the salary space to register Dani Olmo or Pau Víctor.

arts.ttl: Atletico Madrid vs Barcelona: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: It's all to play for in Wednesday's Copa del Rey semi-final, as Atletico Madrid host the second leg against Barcelona. Atletico predicted lineup vs Barcelona (4-4-2) : Musso; Llorente, Gimenez, Lenglet, Reinildo; Simeone, Barrios, De Paul, Lino; Alvarez, Griezmann.

arts.ttl: Barcelona XI vs Atletico Madrid – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Barcelona face Atletico Madrid in the second leg of their Copa del Rey semi-final this evening. The return has plenty to live up to after a thrilling first leg. The two teams shared eight goals in a pulsating 4-4 draw to leave the tie in the balance at The Metropolitano. The German is on the verge of his second final of this season, but to achieve it, he will have to win the second leg of the Copa del Rey semifinal against Atlético de Madrid at the Metropolitano. The Barça coach assessed the duo's physical condition ahead of the Copa del Rey semi-final second leg against Atlético Madrid.

arts.ttl: Barcelona rocked by fresh La Liga accusations over Fair Play & Dani Olmo's registration
arts.sum: La Liga have lowered Barcelona's salary cap amid concerns over the €100m sale of VIP seats in the new Camp Nou.

arts.ttl: Liverpool, Man City 'battling' Barcelona for La Liga star as £16.7m offer 'is prepared'
arts.sum: Liverpool and Manchester City allegedly join Barcelona in the race for Rayo Vallecano's Andrei Ratiu during this summer's transfer window.

arts.ttl: Yamal is on another planet when it comes to one particular stat
arts.sum: Most successful dribbles across Europe's top 5 leagues this season: The teenager caught the eye with his brilliant ability on the ball as he took his tally to successful dribbles this season to an impressive 114.
